subject: Fix Message Router ports in robot test suite
commit_message:
Fix Message Router ports in robot test suite

https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/86515/ disabled the use of HTTP ports in
Message Router by default and so 3904 is not there on a fresh install.
This commit change the use of default message router port and scheme in
robot testsuite

Change-Id: I92d267b9482c21606fb9b437f6c64a18f044184a
Issue-ID: DMAAP-1152
Signed-off-by: efiacor <fiachra.corcoran@est.tech>

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1:

Hello Fiachra, review https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/87752/ that I have posted __should__ fix the issue so maybe we won't have to revert.

Disabling HTTP port by default is a good practice IMHO
